item.question: A bank wants to hand over to an external service provider the decision on whether to enter into or terminate client relationships. Is this permissible under the outsourcing rules?

reason: Accept variant 'admissible' appears verbatim in the question ('Is this admissible?'), so echoing the question word would score as correct and a substring matcher would false-positive on a 'not admissible' answer; removed it and added 'permissible' as a non-overlapping affirmative variant. Gold 'yes' is correct per Rz 9 (operational compliance tasks may be outsourced in all supervisory categories).

item.question: A bank in supervisory category 4 would like to transfer its operational compliance tasks to an external provider. Is this admissible?
Is the outsourcing of a significant function by an insurance company subject to FINMA authorisation because of its relevance to the business plan?

reason: Accept variant 'admissible' appears verbatim in the question ('Is the outsourcing abroad admissible?'); removed it and added 'permissible'. On the flagged Rz 31 concern: Rz 30 itself frames the expressly-guaranteed inspection and audit rights as the admissibility condition ('is admissible if...'), and the question states exactly that condition, so gold 'yes' is supported by the cited chunk; Rz 31's resolvability requirement is a separate additional obligation, not part of Rz 30's admissibility test.

item.question: A Swiss bank plans to move its securities settlement to a service provider located abroad and can expressly guarantee that it, its audit firm and FINMA are able to enforce their inspection and audit rights there. Is the outsourcing abroad admissible?

A bank outsources its IT operations to a shared-services company within its own group and can demonstrate that the risks typically associated with outsourcing are absent. May the intra-group relationship be taken into account when applying the requirements on selecting and monitoring the service provider?
item.section: C. Outsourcing within a group or conglomerate

In conjunction with which business plan form do insurance companies keep their inventory of outsourced functions?
